name: libpod-readme-perl
title: libpod-readme-perl
summary: Perl module to convert POD to README file
description:
Perl module to convert POD to README file
Pod::Readme is no longer a subclass of a POD parsing module. Instead, it is a
simple POD filter.
.
This module allows authors to mark portions of the POD to be included only in,
or to be excluded from the README file.  It also allows you to include
portions of another file (such as a separate ChangeLog).

commands.name: pod2readme
commands.description: Intelligently generate a README file from POD

arguments.description: only update if files are changed
arguments.raw: -F  only update if files are changed

arguments.description: Intelligently generate a README file from POD
arguments.raw: -file  Intelligently generate a README file from POD

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use pod2readme because Perl module to convert POD to README file.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use pod2readme as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `pod2readme -f markdown lib/MyApp.pm` as documented upstream for pod2readme.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair pod2readme with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `pod2readme --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

arguments.description: only update if files are changed

arguments.name: -file
arguments.description: Intelligently generate a README file from POD

documentation.readme: pod2readme - Intelligently generate a README file from POD USAGE pod2readme [-cfho] [long options...] input-file [output-file] [target] Intelligently generate a README file from POD -t --target target type (default: 'readme') -f --format output format (default: 'text') -b --backup backup output file -o --output output filename (default based on target) -c --stdout output to stdout (console) -F --force only update if files are changed -h --help print usage and exit
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install libpod-readme-perl. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `pod2readme -f markdown lib/MyApp.pm`. Perl module to convert POD to README file.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: Perl module to convert POD to README file.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: pod2readme - Intelligently generate a README file from POD USAGE pod2readme [-cfho] [long options...] input-file [output-file] [target] Intelligently generate a README file from POD -t --target target type (default: 'readme') -f --format output format (default: 'text') -b --backup backup output file -o --output output filename (default based on target) -c --stdout output to stdout (console) -F --f.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install libpod-readme-perl
